items.title: In Greenland, Protesters Denounce Opening of Bigger U.S. Consulate
items.summary: “Go away!” demonstrators yelled outside the newly opened diplomatic outpost, as guests inside nibbled on musk ox hot dogs.

items.title: Glow worms and slime moulds found in Scotland's declining rainforest
items.summary: A citizen science project is aiming to document species on the Cowal Peninsula for the first time in 50 years.
